title: Petrol's Parts
body:
Petrol's Parts are a collection of useful new components for Create. Most are used for transfering rotation in new ways. There are no retextured Cogwheels or "black boxes" - every kinetic component provides a new connection not available in base Create, and all are satisfyingly animated.

Petrol's Parts (note: the mod is not called "Create: Petrol's Parts") include the following kinetic components:
- **Coaxial Cogwheel** and **Large Coaxial Cogwheel** - Cogwheels whose Shafts and teeth rotate independently
- **Corner Shaft** - take a guess
- **Differential** - rotates at the sum of its two input speeds
- **Planetary Gearset** - modified Large Cogwheel
- **Colossal Cogwheel** - a 5x5 ring gear
- **Hydraulic Transmission** - end-game cheater part that can connect kinetics in almost any way 

It also includes these non-kinetic features:
- **Brass Depot** - allows filtering Filling, Pressing, Deploying, Blasting, Haunting, Smoking and Splashing recipes
- **Pneumatic Tube** - like the Hydraulic Transmission, but moves Items
- **Redstone Programmer** - essentially a MIDI editor for Redstone signals, making it easier to make music and automate with Redstone Links
- Encasing Crushing Wheels (this is a feature from the Library) which allows Crushing and Milling recipes to be filtered

All the components have Ponders explaining them. A few of them allow you to easily make connections that would be difficult in base Create, so modpack authors may wish to gate the recipes for some of Petrol's Parts. There are config options to easily disable recipes for any component.

**It requires [Create](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/create) and [this library](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/petrolpark)!**

### Requests for ports to other modloaders or versions will be ignored.
